summary: Completed issue 097 locally. SpecBridge prepared the next multi-slice live pilot contract from the Standard Loop `next_contract_seed`, generated a three-slice executor handoff, created executor packets and plan-only runtime launch artifacts for `status`, `tests`, and `docs`, documented the launch boundary, and preserved the no-live-execution policy boundary.
policy_result: Passed locally. Work stayed inside the issue 097 execution contract and scope manifest. The generated runtime launch plans are plan-only and record launches_claude=false, launches_antigravity=false, executes_shell=false, installs_dependencies=false, and deploys=false. The task did not access secrets, touch production, change billing, change auth or authorization security, change databases, install dependencies, change workflows, execute runtime plans, or deploy.
risk_result: Medium risk because the task prepares future runtime handoff and launch plan artifacts. Risk is bounded by non-overlapping executor scopes, plan-only runtime launch policies, local validation, security gate, review gate, and GitHub CI as an external merge gate.
unresolved_risks: GitHub PR CI evidence is pending until the branch is pushed and checks run.
No live Claude Code or Antigravity execution is performed by this contract; any future live slice requires a dedicated operator launch or follow-up contract.
merge_status: Pending pull request, GitHub CI, deterministic review gate, and required merge gates.
